ABOUT_SECTION_TEXT: I have several years of experience in web development, and I believe in providing tailored solutions for every client. My main focus is developing web-based mapping applications, so I offer not only custom website development but also the visualization of spatial data in a web environment.
CARD_CLEANCODE_TEXT: Writing maintainable, scalable code that follows best practices and industry standards.
CARD_INNOVATION_TEXT: Staying updated with the latest technologies and trends to deliver cutting-edge solutions.
CARD_COLLABORATION_TEXT: Working closely with teams and clients to bring visions to life effectively.
CARD_PERFORMANCE_TEXT: Building fast, optimized applications that provide excellent user experiences.
SKILLS_SECTION_TEXT: A comprehensive toolkit of modern technologies and frameworks I use to build amazing web applications.
SKILLS_FRONTEND_DESC: To make your website modern, smooth, dynamic, tailored for Your needs. Because your client's first impression is the most important. Satisfy it!
SKILLS_BACKEND_DESC: What is under the hood, must work effectively! I make sure it does, no matter, how much data your organization works with.
SKILLS_TOOLS_OTHERS_DESC: Design and architecture planning, spatial data manipulation, everything else you need. I am responsible for the entire life cycle of a project
PROJECTS_SECTION_TITLE: Want to visit to Middle Earth?
PROJECTS_SECTION_SUBTITLE: Take a look at one of my favourite, interactive web map projects!
PROJECT_SECTION_CHAT: Chat with legendary characters like Gandalf or Gollum
PROJECT_SECTION_KNOWLEDGEBASE: Explore the history of Middle-earth’s ancient kingdoms
PROJECT_SECTION_QUIZ: Test your knowledge with interactive lore quizzes
PROJECT_SECTION_EXPLORE: Discover iconic locations across the world of Tolkien
VACZICUTS_DESC: A portfolio page of a hairdresser in Budapest
KOLIAPP_DESC: An administrative application for college students, to make life easier in dormitory.
MIDDLE_EARTH_DESC: A web map application of Middle Earth, from Tolkien's universe.
CONTACT_SECTION_TEXT: Already have a concept, just need a professional to help shape it? Got an idea, but not sure how to bring it to life? Get in touch through any of my contact channels or send me a message right away!
